statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next Anton slice: an **Accessory Power Issue Flow** for dead 12V sockets, phone chargers, front/console accessory sockets, overload checks, and repeat accessory-power issues.

Changed:
- `diagnostics.html`: added `#accessory-power-workflow`, linked it from shortcuts, quick checks, Fuse Symptom Finder, and related cards.
- `search-data.js`: added owner-language search coverage.
- `tools/audit/Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1`: added future smoke assertion.
- `service-worker.js`: bumped cache to `ridgeline-console-v251`.
- Updated `AGENT_STATE.md`, `AGENT_BACKLOG.md`, `ANTON_ROADMAP.md`, `SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md`, and `ANTON.md`.

Verification passed:
- Internal link/anchor audit passed for 16 HTML files.
- Playwright/Chrome checked `diagnostics.html#accessory-power-workflow` on desktop and iPhone width.
- Confirmed no mobile horizontal overflow.
- Confirmed search for `accessory socket not working` surfaces the new flow.
- Confirmed Escape closes Search without leaving `modal-open`.
- Screenshots saved under `debug-screenshots/audit-v251-*`.

Source used: Honda 2019 Ridgeline owner manual PDF for accessory power socket behavior/limits: https://cdn.dealereprocess.org/cdn/servicemanuals/honda/2019-ridgeline.pdf

Next clean slice: add an audio/radio/display symptom mini-flow, still routing only into existing Cabin/Hood fuse and garage-note references unless stronger sources are added.
